title: Vanilla Ventures
description: Vanilla Ventures is a modpack that breathes new life into the classic Minecraft experience. By seamlessly integrating a carefully curated selection of mods.
body:
[![BisectHosting use code AMPZ for 25% off](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe58ba1cd2522e2cb17e11a34620a34b58332beb.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/AMPZ?r=modrinth)

Want to show your support for me and the development of Vanilla Ventures? Check out BisectHosting and use the AMPZ for a 25% discount on your first month of a gaming server as a new customer. With their 24/7 support and quick response times, you can count on excellent assistance for all your gaming requirements. To get started click the banner above or visiting this [link](https://bisecthosting.com/AMPZ)

## ##

![welcome banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d061c14b9618513b88d7a9c61b5cb99e810f07d4.webp)

![Minecraft Java Edition](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft%20Java%20Edition-1.21.1-limegreen?style=for-the-badge&logo=block)
![Minimum RAM](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minimum%20RAM-3GB-limegreen?style=for-the-badge&logo=)
![Server Files](https://img.shields.io/badge/Server%20Files-Yes-limegreen?style=for-the-badge&logo=)

#### NO OPTIFINE NEEDED: Access Shaders in Video Settings > Shader Packs > Add Your Shader

![Description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/16d81e0f6e10155650fa1bd00a7759be1ba01e0c.webp)

Explore new and diverse landscapes with **Biomes O' Plenty**, adding a wealth of unique biomes that bring fresh excitement to your adventures. Whether you're traversing lush forests, arid deserts, or serene meadows, the variety of environments ensures endless exploration possibilities.

Construct beautiful and functional bridges with **Macaw's Bridges** mod, providing practical pathways across rivers and valleys. These bridges not only enhance the visual appeal of your builds but also make navigation more seamless and enjoyable.

**Vanilla Ventures** offers a familiar yet refreshingly enriched journey through Minecraft. Whether you're building, exploring, or surviving, this modpack promises to enhance your Minecraft experience while staying true to the essence.

![Included Mods](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9581da05f6364489ebe3dc5607db28beefd92614.webp)

🌍 [William Wythers' Overhauled Overworld](https://modrinth.com/mod/wwoo) + [William Wythers' Expanded Ecosphere](https://modrinth.com/mod/expanded-ecosphere)

🌍 [Biomes O' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty)

🌍 [Oh The Biomes We've Gone](https://modrinth.com/mod/oh-the-biomes-weve-gone)

🌍 [Dungeons and Taverns](https://modrinth.com/datapack/dungeons-and-taverns)

🌍 [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated)

🌍 [The Aether](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether)

🌍 [Essential Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential)

🌍 [Vivecraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/vivecraft)

🌍 YUNG'S Better Mods

🌍 Built in Shader support thanks to [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris)

🌍 No Chat Reporting (Restores the chat back to Pre 1.19)

🌍 Quality of Life improvements such as Backpacks, Controller Support, Craftable Hourse Armor, [Macaw’s Bridges](https://modrinth.com/mod/macaws-bridges) + Biome addons, Waystones, Optimizations and much more.

🌍 100+ Mods

![Installation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3bdc51ac113c91238c01cefbc6460b91db468f9c.webp)

**FABRIC:** While the latest version of Fabric for 1.21.1 should be compatible, it's possible that it may cause an older mod in the modpack to break. In such a case, the version of Fabric currently included in the modpack is 0.16.10

**OptiFine:** By default, OptiFine is not compatible with Vanilla Ventures because it contains some pre-installed optimization mods. Therefore, you must remove the listed mods below in order to load the pack with OptiFine.

<details>
<summary>Optimization Mods</summary>

|||
| ------------- | ------------- |
| [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)  ||
| [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) | |
| [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium) | |
| [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) | |
| [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast) | |
| [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) | |
| [Cull Less Leaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/cull-less-leaves) | |
| [Custom Entity Models](https://modrinth.com/mod/cem) | |
| [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) | |
| [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling) | |
| [OptiGUI](https://modrinth.com/mod/optigui)  ||

</details>

Please remember that in addition to OptiFine, you must also have a mod called OptiFabric installed, otherwise the pack will crash. We do not recommend using OptiFine at all due to its closed source and mod incompatibility. You can download OptiFabric from [this link](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/optifabric) if you still want to use OptiFine.

## OPTIONAL RECOMMENDATIONS: ##

If your system can handle it, I recommend trying out shaders with this modpack and Minecraft to enhance your experience. Shaders can significantly improve both the modpack and the game. For the best results, consider using either [Complementary Shaders - Unbound](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-unbound) or [Complementary Shaders - Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined).
